title: Castle Dungeons
body:
# Castle Dungeons

![Banner](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/etpVl23u/images/e695fdbd684aff3f03a7910e2b5a5e3066e055b5.png)

## About

Castle Dungeons is a mod that adds procedurally generated castles. 
The idea was to make a mod that adds underground dungeons, but such already existed, so I decided to made dungeons on the surface. 
This mod doesn't add any new content except structures to the game, so it isn't required on client.

## Structures

By default, there are two types of castle: plains and desert. 
They are dangerous and full of illagers. 
There are a lot of different rooms, which have its own unique loot. 
Each castle also has a boss room.

## Configuration

Configuration is Data Pack driven. Sadly wiki is not yet written, however you can check how default castles are configured.

## Compatibility

This mod supports both Forge and Fabric. It should not conflict with other mods. Please report an issue if you find an incompatibility.

## Modpacks

You can use this mod in your modpack as long as you do not redistribute this mod.
